'ω' )و 仙剑三那里真的好喜欢常无邪，可惜作者写死了，另外希望不要有CP，主要是觉得蓝涣喜欢女主喜欢的莫名其妙的有点，就是听听琴就喜欢上了？真的好奇怪，好歹常无邪和女主相处了上千年，而且女主会给温暖，虽然无意，但是会安慰常无邪，说的话暖他心啊！属于相处成家人了，这种相处才舒服。最不喜欢的就是一见钟情但是互动都没啥就喜欢上了，感觉莫名其妙","text_exts":[{"e":24,"s":21,"text":"陈情令","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%99%88%E6%83%85%E4%BB%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119583487B8592%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227255341996264080185%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227203607295098358840%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%99%88%E6%83%85%E4%BB%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":28,"s":25,"text":"寻秦记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AF%BB%E7%A7%A6%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119583487B8592%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227255341996264080185%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227203607295098358840%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AF%BB%E7%A7%A6%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":188,"s":184,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119583487B8592%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227255341996264080185%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227203607295098358840%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689266151,"group_id": 更糟糕的设定来了，魔神不断的跟着主角到处跑，还要当主角的哥哥，还影响主角的人生，毫无好处，死烦
啊啊，看到临江仙了，那个该死的常无念，老是跟主角对着干，好烦这个设定啊，为什么要突然冒出来这么一个人，然后还不停的纠缠主角，这个世界还搁那儿散播瘟疫，真的好讨厌，一边妹妹妹妹的叫着，一边跟主角对着干，然后主角还只能忍下来，真的太憋屈了，好想弃文，要不是喜欢主角
我还翻回去又把前面几个世界看了一遍，但是那个常一出现我就只想跳过了，唉，我说为什么我没有把这本书列到我喜欢的分类里，真的是一颗老鼠屎坏了一锅粥
啊，那个常终于暂时消失了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765811733,"group_id":"7203607295098358840","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4174211644405294"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7203607295098358840","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1648"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读64小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":79533,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":228713,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7213184960789332748","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"刚看完第一个世界，很好看，之前看综穿的小说，一直不敢看陈情令，因为很喜欢剧，所以一直担心小说会把自己喜欢的角色改的乱七八糟，这是第一次看，很喜欢这样的陈情","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":27,"text":"陈情令","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%99%88%E6%83%85%E4%BB%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119583487B8592%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227213184960789332748%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227203607295098358840%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%99%88%E6%83%85%E4%BB%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679450655,"group_id":"7203607295098358840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望顺遂每一天","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz/EZigI+oOYvJF6OL5hL//c7J7sZt+HLmzm6pPSVwgj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9dc76851b45644cd81214fd611eb670c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702875&x-signature=vxGeKJuFo4htgoN15K
